title: Aureline scaffold-run record
description: Seed schema for the scaffold-run record produced when a scaffold plan executes, read by Start Center, support exporters, migration flows, and the generated-project lineage surface when it names **which run executed which plan against which descriptor**, **what artifacts it created or modified**, **which declared hooks / validation tasks it invoked**, **which checkpoint and generated-project lineage refs it bound**, **what its outcome and rollback state were**, and **which actor dispatched it**. The run keeps generated-project updates replay-safe for support and migration flows. One record per run. Raw absolute paths, raw credentials, raw remote URLs, and raw generated file content never appear; only opaque refs and typed labels cross the boundary. A conforming run invokes only hooks and validation tasks declared on its descriptor; an undeclared hook or task is rejected at projection time. Generated output remains plain, attributable workspace content: plain_file_authority and no_hidden_project_database MUST be true on a conforming claimed beta run, so no hidden project database and no silent post-create package restore is the authoritative result of generation. Adding a new scaffold_actor_class, scaffold_outcome_class, or rollback_state_class is additive-minor and bumps scaffold_run_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking. Companion contracts: /schemas/workspace/template_generator_descriptor.schema.json and /schemas/workspace/scaffold_plan.schema.json.

scaffold_run_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the scaffold-run payload shape. Bumped only on breaking payload changes.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in support bundles and claim manifests. Raw absolute paths, raw credentials, raw URLs, and raw bytes never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: Producer-local monotonic timestamp. Opaque to this schema.

redaction_aware_text.description: Redaction-aware free text (<= 1024 graphemes). The exporter applies the redaction policy before the value crosses the boundary.

fixture_metadata.description: Optional worked-example prelude carried on fixtures. Ignored by the boundary contract.

scaffold_actor_class.description: Closed actor-class set for the actor that dispatched the run. 'ai_assistant' and 'extension' are first-class actors whose runs stay inside the governed scaffold-plan / diff-review surface.

scaffold_outcome_class.description: Closed run-outcome set. 'failed_left_in_place' and 'failed_rolled_back' leave artifacts the user must be able to attribute and clean up.

rollback_state_class.description: Closed rollback-state set. A run that failed and left artifacts MUST NOT report 'not_needed'.

scaffold_actor.description: Typed actor lineage for the run.

scaffold_rollback_state.description: Typed rollback state carried by the run.

invoked_declared_hook_ids.description: Hooks invoked by the run. Every entry MUST be a declared hook on the descriptor.

invoked_declared_task_ids.description: Validation tasks invoked by the run. Every entry MUST be a declared task on the descriptor.

generated_lineage_ref.description: Opaque ref to the plain-file generated-project lineage metadata. The plain file remains authoritative.

scaffold_run_record.description: One scaffold-run record. Emitted when a scaffold plan executes. Keeps generated-project updates replay-safe for support and migration flows.
